# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud database security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Server"
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Database"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources"
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Server administrator login"
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL Server administrator password"
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "P1",
        "P2"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU"
      }
    },
    "allowedIpAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed IP addresses with startIpAddress and endIpAddress"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
        "catalogCollation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowedIP-', copyIndex())]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]"
      ],
      "condition": "[greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0)]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "firewallRulesCopy",
        "count": "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0), length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 1)]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0), parameters('allowedIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].startIpAddress, '0.0.0.0')]",
        "endIpAddress": "[if(greater(length(parameters('allowedIpAddresses')), 0), parameters('allowedIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].endIpAddress, '0.0.0.0')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "connectionType": "Default"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/current')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "state": "Enabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('sqlServerResourceId')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
